add-filled-arc-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Arc Graph to PDF
add-filled-arc-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, add a Graph containing a filled Arc shape with custom colors, and save the file with platform‑specific handling.

add-unfilled-arc-line-width-dash-style.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Line Width and Dash Style
add-unfilled-arc-line-width-dash-style.description: Shows how to draw an unfilled arc in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configure its line width and dash pattern via GraphInfo, and place it inside a Graph on a page.

insert-circle-gradient.title: Insert Circle with Gradient Fill into PDF Graph
insert-circle-gradient.description: Demonstrates how to add a circle shape to a graph and apply a radial gradient fill using two colors.

add-filled-circle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Circle to PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
add-filled-circle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a Graph, draw a filled circle with custom colors and line width, and save the file while handling platform‑specific GDI+ issues.

create-bezier-curve-pdf-graph.title: Create Bezier Curve in PDF Graph with Stroke Color
create-bezier-curve-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw a Bezier curve using four control points inside an Aspose.Pdf Graph, set its stroke color and line width, and save the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

add-filled-curve-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Curve to PDF with Opacity and Border
add-filled-curve-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Bezier curve inside a Graph, set its fill opacity and border thickness, and save the result as a PDF.

draw-straight-line-with-rounded-caps.title: Draw a Straight Line with Rounded Caps in a PDF Graph
draw-straight-line-with-rounded-caps.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a graph to a page, and draws a red straight line with rounded end caps using Aspose.Pdf drawing APIs.

add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.title: Add Multi-Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph in Aspose.Pdf, add several Line shapes with different colors to represent a continuous data series, and save the PDF while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.title: Insert Rounded Rectangle into PDF Graph
insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a Graph, add a rectangle with rounded corners, apply fill and stroke colors, and save the result as a PDF.

add-filled-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Dashed Rectangle to PDF using Graph
add-filled-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a filled rectangle with a dashed border on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and GraphInfo classes.

create-ellipse-with-stroke-color.title: Create Ellipse with Stroke Color in PDF
create-ellipse-with-stroke-color.description: Demonstrates drawing an ellipse in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph, specifying horizontal and vertical radii, setting the stroke color, and saving the document.

add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a Graph, align it to the horizontal center of a PDF page, add it to the page's Paragraphs collection, and save the document.

place-graph-left-margin.title: Place Graph on PDF Page Aligned to Left Margin
place-graph-left-margin.description: Shows how to add a Graph object to an existing PDF and align it to the left margin with a custom offset using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-graph-dimensions-pdf.title: Set Graph Dimensions in PDF
set-graph-dimensions-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in an Aspose.Pdf document, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a rectangle shape, and saving the PDF with platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

create-dimension-line-pdf-graph.title: Create a Dimension Line in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-dimension-line-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to add a horizontal dimension line to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container and Line shape, with platform‑specific handling for PDF saving.

create-rectangle-in-graph.title: Create Rectangle with Specific Dimensions Inside a Graph
create-rectangle-in-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a graph of defined size, draw a rectangle with exact coordinates and dimensions inside the graph, and save the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ issues.

check-adjust-shape-bounds-pdf.title: Check and Adjust Shape Bounds in a PDF
check-adjust-shape-bounds-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a rectangle shape, verifies that it fits within the page bounds, adjusts its position if necessary, and adds it to the page.

iterate-graph-shapes-bounding-boxes.title: Iterate Graph Shapes and Log Bounding Boxes
iterate-graph-shapes-bounding-boxes.description: Creates a PDF with a Graph, adds rectangle and ellipse shapes, then iterates through all shapes to output their bounding box coordinates.

rotate-graph-in-pdf.title: Rotate Graph Element in PDF
rotate-graph-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a graph, set its rotation angle in degrees, add a rectangle shape, and save the PDF while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

translate-rectangle-in-pdf.title: Translate Rectangle in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
translate-rectangle-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to define a rectangle, shift it horizontally and vertically with MoveBy, and display the moved shape using a SquareAnnotation in a PDF document.

scale-graph-non-uniformly-pdf.title: Scale Graph Non‑Uniformly in PDF
scale-graph-non-uniformly-pdf.description: Demonstrates applying different X and Y scaling rates to an Aspose.Pdf Graph, adding a rectangle shape, positioning the graph, and handling platform‑specific PDF saving.

skew-graph-x-axis.title: Skew Graph Element on X Axis in PDF
skew-graph-x-axis.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 30° X‑axis skew to a Graph object in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, creating a slanted visual effect.

apply-clipping-region-graph.title: Apply Clipping Region to a Graph
apply-clipping-region-graph.description: Demonstrates how to set a clipping rectangle on a Graph so that its shapes are rendered only inside the defined area.

create-semi-transparent-rectangle-pdf.title: Create Semi-Transparent Rectangle in PDF
create-semi-transparent-rectangle-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use an ARGB fill color to draw a semi‑transparent rectangle on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf by creating a Graph, adding a shape, and saving the document.

add-shadow-to-rectangle.title: Add Shadow Effect to a Filled Rectangle in a Graph
add-shadow-to-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to create a filled rectangle inside a graph and apply a shadow effect by setting offset and blur parameters.

create-star-shape-pdf.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF
create-star-shape-pdf.description: Shows how to build a star polygon with a configurable number of points, radii, and fill color using Aspose.Pdf Graph and Path objects, then save it as a PDF.

add-hexagon-graph-to-pdf.title: Add a Hexagon Graph with Border Styling to PDF
add-hexagon-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a regular hexagon as a Graph, set its border color and thickness, and embed it in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-inside-graph-pdf.title: Add Text Inside a Graph in PDF
add-text-inside-graph-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Graph on a PDF page, position it, and insert a TextFragment inside the graph with custom font family, size, color, and exact coordinates.

add-background-image-and-draw-shapes.title: Add Background Image to PDF Page and Draw Shapes Over It
add-background-image-and-draw-shapes.description: Demonstrates setting a page background image in a PDF and overlaying a Graph with rectangle, line, and ellipse shapes using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-scale-rotate-image-in-pdf.title: Insert, Scale, and Rotate Image in PDF
insert-scale-rotate-image-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add an external image to a PDF page, scale it proportionally, and rotate it by a given angle using Aspose.Pdf.

create-new-pdf-single-page.title: Create a New PDF with a Single Page
create-new-pdf-single-page.description: Shows how to create an empty PDF document, add a default‑size page, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

instantiate-graph-with-page-dimensions.title: Instantiate Graph Matching Page Dimensions
instantiate-graph-with-page-dimensions.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph object that exactly matches the width and height of a PDF page, add a rectangle shape to it, and save the document with platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add Red Filled Rectangle to PDF Using Graph
add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle with absolute coordinates and a solid red fill to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Rectangle classes.

apply-linear-gradient-ellipse.title: Apply Linear Gradient Fill to an Ellipse in a PDF Graph
apply-linear-gradient-ellipse.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a graph with an ellipse, and fill the ellipse with a blue‑to‑green linear gradient using Aspose.Pdf shading pattern.

create-semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.title: Create Semi‑Transparent Ellipse in PDF
create-semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.description: Demonstrates drawing an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Ellipse classes, and includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ availability.

add-centered-text-graph.title: Add Centered Text Inside a Rectangle on a Graph
add-centered-text-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a graph, draw a rectangle shape, and place a centered "Hello World" text fragment inside it.

enable-bounds-check-mode-graph.title: Enable Bounds Check Mode for Graph Shapes in PDF
enable-bounds-check-mode-graph.description: Shows how to activate BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit on a Graph to validate that added shapes fit within the graph area during PDF rendering.

catch-out-of-bounds-shapes-pdf-graph.title: Catch Out-of-Bounds Shapes When Adding to a PDF Graph
catch-out-of-bounds-shapes-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to enable bounds checking for a Graph, add shapes, catch BoundsOutOfRangeException, and log the coordinates of shapes that exceed the page limits.

add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.title: Add Non-Overlapping Rectangles to a PDF Graph
add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.description: Shows how to place multiple rectangles of varying sizes onto a PDF graph while preventing overlap by using bounds checking with Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle.IsIntersect.

add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle and Ellipse Shapes to a PDF Graph
add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.description: The example shows how to create a Graph, add a rectangle and an ellipse with distinct fill and stroke colors, and embed the graph into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to Disk
export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a file on disk.

add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf.title: Add Graph with Shapes to Existing PDF
add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, appending a new page, and drawing a graph containing rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes using Aspose.Pdf.

add-gradient-ellipses-to-pdfs-parallel.title: Add Gradient-Filled Ellipses to PDFs in Parallel
add-gradient-ellipses-to-pdfs-parallel.description: Demonstrates loading multiple PDF files concurrently, adding a graph of gradient‑filled ellipses to each page, and saving the modified documents.

set-graph-line-width-dash-style-rectangl.title: Set Graph Line Width and Dash Style for Rectangle Borders
set-graph-line-width-dash-style-rectangl.description: Demonstrates configuring a Graph's line width and dash pattern, then applying matching border styling to a rectangle shape before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-percent.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity to 50% Using ARGB Color
set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-percent.description: Demonstrates creating a rectangle in a PDF, applying a semi‑transparent fill using an ARGB color (50 % opacity), and saving the document.

create-sample-graph-for-pdf.title: Create Sample Graph with Shapes for PDF Page
create-sample-graph-for-pdf.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf graph containing a rectangle, an ellipse, and a line that can be added to any PDF page.

serialize-pdf-graph-to-byte-array.title: Serialize PDF with Graph to Byte Array
serialize-pdf-graph-to-byte-array.description: Creates a PDF containing a simple line graph using Aspose.Pdf, saves it into a MemoryStream, and returns the PDF bytes for network transmission, with cross‑platform handling for missing GDI+.

deserialize-add-graph.title: Deserialize PDF from Byte Array and Add Graph with Labels
deserialize-add-graph.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, then adding a new graph containing a rectangle and a text label to the document.

add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Solid Fill to PDF
add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.description: Shows how to insert a rectangle with rounded corners and a solid fill color into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-rotate-ellipse-pdf.title: Create and Rotate an Ellipse in a PDF Graph
create-rotate-ellipse-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create an ellipse, apply a 45-degree rotation using GraphInfo (and optionally a transformation matrix), and add it to a Graph container in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.title: Create PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects to a single PDF page, position them at different coordinates, and draw shapes within each graph to form a collage.

add-rectangle-gradient.title: Add Rectangle with Linear Gradient (Transparent to Opaque)
add-rectangle-gradient.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle filled with a linear gradient that transitions from transparent to opaque using the alpha channel.

measure-ellipse-bounding-box-with-gradie.title: Measure Ellipse Bounding Box with Gradient Fill
measure-ellipse-bounding-box-with-gradie.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a radial gradient fill using Aspose.Pdf and programmatically retrieve its bounding box coordinates before saving the PDF.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.title: Create Multi-Page PDF with Full-Page Graphs
create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing several pages of different sizes and add a Graph that occupies the entire page on each one using Aspose.Pdf.

handle-bounds-exception.title: Handle BoundsOutOfRangeException When Adding Shapes
handle-bounds-exception.description: Demonstrates enabling bounds checking for shape addition, catching the exception, and logging detailed shape coordinates.

configurable-shape-fill-colors-pdf-graph.title: Apply Configurable Fill Colors to Shapes in a PDF Graph
configurable-shape-fill-colors-pdf-graph.description: The example reads a JSON configuration file to obtain fill colors for different shapes, then creates a PDF document with a Graph containing a rectangle and an ellipse using those colors. It also includes platform‑aware handling for PDF saving.

add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a Graph, draw a rectangle with a 2‑point dashed border, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

graph-bounds-check.title: Create Graph with Overlapping Shapes and BoundsCheckMode
graph-bounds-check.description: Demonstrates adding overlapping rectangle and ellipse to a graph and using BoundsCheckMode to prevent overlaps.

out-of-bounds-rectangle-graph.title: Test Out-of-Bounds Rectangle on Graph
out-of-bounds-rectangle-graph.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle shape that exceeds the page bounds to a graph and catching the resulting BoundsOutOfRangeException.

batch-insert-logo-graph-into-pdf-pages.title: Batch Insert Logo Graph into PDF Pages
batch-insert-logo-graph-into-pdf-pages.description: Loads each PDF from a source folder, creates a Graph with a rectangle representing a company logo, adds the graph to every page, and saves the modified PDFs to an output folder.

create-pdf-with-graph.title: Create PDF with Graph in Memory
create-pdf-with-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF in memory using Aspose.Pdf, add a Graph container with a rectangle shape, and return the PDF as a byte array.

add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Graph with Shapes to PDF
add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a Graph covering the page, add rectangle and ellipse shapes, and save the updated file via a command‑line utility.

create-pdf-proportional-shapes-graph.title: Create PDF with Proportional Shapes Using Graph
create-pdf-proportional-shapes-graph.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where each page contains a graph with shapes sized proportionally to the page dimensions.

add-colored-shapes-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Colored Shapes to PDF Using a Graph and Dictionary
add-colored-shapes-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to map shape identifiers to fill colors with a dictionary and apply those colors when building a Graph containing rectangles, ellipses, and lines in a PDF document.

add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.title: Add Ellipse with Border and Centered Text to PDF
add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.description: Creates a PDF, adds an ellipse with a thick border and semi‑transparent fill, then places a centered text fragment inside it.

graph-with-shapes-and-text-pdf.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and Text
graph-with-shapes-and-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add vector shapes (rectangle, ellipse, line) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Graph and place styled text fragments inside each shape.

scale-graph-shapes.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using Transform
scale-graph-shapes.description: Demonstrates how to scale all shapes in a Graph by 150 % using the GraphInfo scaling properties before adding it to a PDF page.

add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle with a drop‑shadow by using a Graph container and a semi‑transparent offset duplicate in Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-graph-with-border-colors.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
create-pdf-graph-with-border-colors.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph where each shape's border color is assigned using a dictionary lookup. Includes platform‑specific handling for saving the document.

place-graph-in-pdf-footer.title: Place a Graph in the PDF Footer with Margins
place-graph-in-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to create a Graph object, add a shape, and embed it in the page footer while configuring page and footer margins using Aspose.Pdf.

create-horizontal-bar-chart.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart with Rectangles
create-horizontal-bar-chart.description: Shows how to generate a PDF bar chart by adding ten rectangle shapes to an Aspose.Pdf Graph with incremental X coordinates.

ellipse-with-texture-brush.title: Add an Ellipse with Texture Brush Placeholder to a PDF
ellipse-with-texture-brush.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading a texture image, and drawing an ellipse using Aspose.Pdf. The code shows where a tiling pattern (texture brush) would be applied via low‑level PDF operators.

create-pdf-graph-filled-outline-shapes.title: Create PDF Graph with Filled and Stroke‑Only Shapes
create-pdf-graph-filled-outline-shapes.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container to draw filled rectangles and ellipses together with outline‑only shapes, and includes platform‑aware PDF saving.

export-graph-to-pdf.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
export-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a Graph containing a rectangle shape, handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability, and saving the document.

add-filled-ellipse-gradient.title: Add Filled Ellipse with Gradient to PDF Graph
add-filled-ellipse-gradient.description: Creates a PDF, adds a graph containing an ellipse filled with an axial gradient, and saves the result.

add-filled-arc-radial-gradient.title: Add Filled Arc with Radial Gradient to PDF Graph
add-filled-arc-radial-gradient.description: Demonstrates how to draw an arc shape with a radial gradient fill inside a graph on a PDF page.

pdf-graph-colored-rectangles.title: Create PDF Graph with Colored Rectangles and Legend
pdf-graph-colored-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF report containing a graph with colored rectangles representing data categories and a legend using Aspose.Pdf.
